name: ICICI Coral Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹1,50,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 4 PAYBACK Points per ₹100 spent on dining
2 PAYBACK Points per ₹100 spent on all other retail purchases

welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

additionalBenefits: BookMyShow Buy 1 Get 1 on movie tickets (1 free ticket per month)
Interest-free credit period up to 48 days
pros: BookMyShow Buy 1 Get 1 saves up to ₹250-400 per month on movies
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
Double reward points on dining spends
Reasonable annual fee of ₹500 with achievable waiver
Good stepping stone to ICICI premium cards
cons: Base reward rate of 0.50% is below average
BMS offer limited to 1 ticket per month
idealFor: Movie enthusiasts who watch films regularly in theatres
Those who dine out frequently and want bonus rewards on dining
Users seeking a mid-range card with lounge access and entertainment perks

faqs.question: How does the BookMyShow Buy 1 Get 1 offer work?
faqs.answer: You can book 2 movie tickets on BookMyShow and get the second one free, up to a maximum discount of ₹250. This offer is valid once per month and applies to all movie screenings.

faqs.question: How many lounge visits do I get with the ICICI Coral?
faqs.answer: You get 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year through Dreamfolks or Visa Lounge Program. International lounge access is not included with this card.

faqs.question: How can I waive the annual fee?
faqs.answer: The annual fee of ₹500 is waived when you spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous anniversary year. This works out to roughly ₹12,500 per month in spending.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from ICICI Coral to a higher card?
faqs.answer: Yes, ICICI Bank allows upgrades from Coral to Rubyx or Sapphiro based on your spending patterns, credit score, and income. You can request an upgrade through iMobile or by contacting customer care.
